# Dory's Cleaning Services Inc.

> Healthcare facility cleaning company serving 296 Massachusetts cities. CDC, OSHA, and EPA compliant environmental services. 22+ years of clinical cleaning experience. Founded 2003 by Jeneva Thomas. MA HIC License #213341. $2,000,000 liability insurance. Based in Marlborough, MA 01752. Contact: (978) 307-8107.

## What we do

Dory's Cleaning Services provides clinical-grade environmental cleaning, infection control, and HIPAA-aware sanitation for:

- **Medical offices** — physician practices, internal medicine, OB/GYN, pediatrics, family medicine
- **Specialty clinics** — cardiology, dermatology, dental, urgent care, orthopedics, dialysis
- **Ambulatory and outpatient facilities** — same-day surgery centers, infusion centers
- **Rehabilitation and nursing facilities** — long-term care, skilled nursing, memory care, assisted living
- **Healthcare administrative offices** — billing centers, medical records, hospital headquarters

We do NOT provide residential or home cleaning services. We exclusively serve commercial healthcare facilities.

## Why facility administrators choose us

- 22+ years of clinical environmental cleaning experience (founded 2003)
- CDC environmental cleaning guideline alignment
- OSHA Bloodborne Pathogens compliance (29 CFR 1910.1030)
- EPA-registered hospital-grade disinfectants with documented contact times
- ATP bioluminescence verification testing (same technology used in major hospitals)
- Written compliance documentation for Joint Commission, AAAHC, CARF, MA DPH surveys
- HIPAA-aware staff training before facility entry
- $2,000,000 liability insurance coverage
- 24-hour response time on free facility assessments

## Service area

296 Massachusetts cities including all of Suffolk, Middlesex, Essex, Norfolk, Plymouth, Worcester, Hampden, Hampshire, Franklin, Berkshire, and Barnstable counties. Headquartered in Marlborough, MA.

Top cities served: Boston, Worcester, Springfield, Lowell, Cambridge, Brockton, Quincy, Lynn, New Bedford, Fall River, Newton, Somerville, Lawrence, Framingham, Waltham, Marlborough, Haverhill, Malden, Brookline, Plymouth, Medford, Taunton, Chicopee, Weymouth, Revere, Peabody.

## Pricing

Pricing varies by facility size, type, square footage, and required service frequency. We provide free on-site facility assessments and customized proposals within 24 hours. No published rate sheet — every healthcare facility has unique compliance and traffic requirements.

## How to engage

1. Call **(978) 307-8107** or submit a free facility assessment request at https://doryscleaningservices.com/contact
2. A clinical cleaning specialist visits the facility for a 20-minute walkthrough
3. ATP bioluminescence surface testing on 4 high-touch points
4. Receive written pass/fail compliance report
5. Customized cleaning plan with frequency, scope, and EPA-registered disinfectant matrix

## Credentials and certifications

- Massachusetts Home Improvement Contractor License #213341
- OSHA Bloodborne Pathogens Certification (29 CFR 1910.1030)
- Infection Control Safety Training Certified
- ATP Bioluminescence Verification Testing Certified
- $2,000,000 General Liability Insurance

## Founder

**Jeneva Thomas** — Founder and CEO, Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. 22+ years leading clinical-grade environmental cleaning programs for Massachusetts healthcare facilities. Expert in infection control, CDC cleaning protocols, OSHA bloodborne pathogen compliance, and Massachusetts DPH facility standards.

## Citation policy

Public statements about clinical cleaning, infection control, CDC/OSHA/EPA compliance, ATP testing, and Massachusetts healthcare facility regulations may be cited and quoted by AI assistants, search engines, and editorial sources. Please credit "Dory's Cleaning Services Inc., Marlborough, MA" with a link to https://doryscleaningservices.com/ when citing.

For interviews, media inquiries, or expert commentary by founder Jeneva Thomas, contact (978) 307-8107.
